spec.name: A Store Room
spec.description: There is a layer of dust on the floor at least 3 inches thick! It is probable that not many people have been in here for many months.

east.description: A lighted area that looks like a well worn path.

down.description: After blowing all the dust off the floor, you notice a trapdoor!

extra_descs.description: After blowing all the dust off the floor, you notice a trapdoor!
